hotkey.label: Summon Hotkey
hotkey.callNowHint: This app has a tray icon. You can open chat from the tray menu.
hotkey.captureDefaultHint: Click "Record Hotkey", then press a combo (e.g. Alt+·). Esc to cancel.
hotkey.captureNeedMainKeyHint: Press one non-modifier key as well.
hotkey.captureNeedModifierHint: Global hotkey requires at least one modifier (Ctrl/Alt/Shift/Meta).
hotkey.captureUnrecognizedHint: Key not recognized, please try again.
hotkey.backgroundWakeHint: Enable background voice wake (hold record hotkey)

notification.title: Message Notifications
notification.summary: Control system notifications and sounds when local chats finish or fail in the background.
notification.enableHint: When off, no system notification is shown for background local chat completion or failure.
notification.soundHint: When on, Windows native notifications use the system default sound.

api.apiKeyPoolHint: All models under the same provider share this round-robin key pool. Cursor +1 after each call.
api.noApiKey: No API Key yet. Click "Add Key" to start.
api.modelCardsHint: Enter model names manually, or pick from refreshed results.
api.codexLoginHint: Local read only checks the credential file itself. If the token expires at runtime, the backend refreshes it as needed.
api.codexOAuthHint: The app will open a browser to complete OAuth login and store credentials in the app-private directory.
api.codexStatusUnchecked: Login status has not been checked yet.
api.codexRateLimitHint: Sync official usage snapshots. Long windows are shown with weekly semantics.
api.codexNoWindowData: This bucket returned no window data
api.codexModelsHint: Codex only allows reasoning effort settings; other parameters stay at defaults.
api.deleteProviderConfirm: Delete provider "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
api.linkHelperHint: Pick a common provider to generate a base URL template.
api.deepSeekKimiProtocolHint: This model name contains DeepSeek/Kimi. Use the DeepSeek / Kimi protocol.

migration.exportNotice: Data will be encrypted and marked with the current version (vX.X)
migration.importNotice: Import will preview and show API config increments
migration.importUploadTitle: Click or drop a migration package
migration.importWarning: Current local config will be backed up before import. The app will restart after the migration is applied.
migration.previewSuccess: Preview finished. Please review the import summary.
migration.applySuccess: Migration applied. The app will restart now.

welcome.title: Welcome Setup Check
welcome.subtitle: These cards check whether your key settings are ready. Finish the required items first, then the recommended ones.
welcome.askLlmHint: If you are unsure how to configure something, just send a screenshot to the LLM and ask it to guide you step by step.
welcome.installFailedFallback: Automatic install failed. The official download page was opened: {err}

git.title: Git
git.summary: Git is required. Terminal workflows, Git Bash, and a lot of later development collaboration depend on it.
git.currentMissing: Git was not detected yet. Try automatic install; if it fails, the official page will open.

node.title: Node.js
node.summary: Node.js is required. Frontend development, many script tools, and later MCP / skill installation depend on it.
node.currentMissing: Node.js was not detected yet. Try automatic install; if it fails, the official page will open.

ripgrep.title: ripgrep (rg)
ripgrep.summary: rg is a fast code search tool commonly used in programming workflows. It makes file and text search faster in large projects.
ripgrep.currentMissing: rg was not detected. You can ask PAI how to install rg.

textModel.title: Available Text Model
textModel.summary: The app needs at least one working text model. A multimodal one is recommended.
textModel.currentOkMultimodal: A working multimodal text model was found: {name}
textModel.currentOk: A working text model was found: {name}. It is not multimodal yet.
textModel.currentMissing: No working text model was detected yet.

expertModel.title: Expert Model
expertModel.summary: Used by default for main chat and expert tasks.
expertModel.currentMissing: The expert model is not set yet.

quickModel.title: Fast Model
quickModel.summary: Used by default for tool review, contact secretary, and lightweight fixed flows.
quickModel.currentMissing: The fast model is not set yet.

voice.title: Speech Recognition
voice.summary: If you want voice input, this is a very worthwhile setup.
voice.currentOk: A speech recognition model was found: {name}
voice.currentMissing: No speech recognition model was detected yet.

embedding.title: Embedding Model
embedding.summary: If you want stronger memory, retrieval, and recall, you should prepare an embedding model.
embedding.currentMissing: No embedding model was detected yet.

rerank.title: Rerank Model
rerank.summary: This helps the AI pick the most relevant items from a lot of information. It is a strong quality upgrade for search and memory, so it is strongly recommended.
rerank.currentMissing: No rerank model was detected yet.

memory.title: Memory
memory.summary: Memory helps the AI remember important things more reliably. After you prepare embedding and rerank, it is a good idea to finish the setup here.
memory.currentMissingModel: You have not prepared memory models yet. That is fine for now if you do not need memory yet.
memory.currentMissingBinding: You already have embedding or rerank models, but memory has not been fully turned on in the Memory page yet.

persona.title: Persona
persona.summary: Personas are different helper styles. You can make one for writing, one for execution, or one just for casual chatting.
persona.currentMissing: You do not have extra personas yet. The default assistant is enough to get started.

department.title: Department
department.summary: Departments are work groups. Later you can split collection, planning, and execution into different departments.
department.currentMissing: You do not have extra departments yet. Using only the primary department is totally fine.

skill.title: Skill
skill.summary: Skills are small how-to guides for the AI. If you are new, you can leave this empty for now and add them later.
skill.currentMissing: No skills were detected yet. That is okay for now.

mcp.title: MCP
mcp.summary: MCP connects extra outside tools or services to the AI. Beginners can safely skip this until they really need it.
mcp.currentMissing: No MCP services are enabled yet. That is not a problem.

tools.gitRequiredHint: No supported shell was detected. Install Git first and use Git Bash.
tools.workspaceHint: The self directory is the shared data folder for all assistants, used to store skills, MCP, and runtime resources.
tools.initializeWorkspaceConfirm: Initialize the self directory? This restores default skill templates and docs, and will not delete your existing directories or repositories.
tools.resetWorkspacePathDone: Self directory path restored to default: {path} (click Save to persist)
tools.resetWorkspacePathFailed: Failed to reset self directory path: {err}
tools.systemCatalogReadonly: Edit department permissions in Department settings

persona.title: Persona
persona.hint: Define the AI persona and tell it what its self-understanding should be.
persona.name: Persona Name
persona.systemPlaceholder: Recommended structure: 1. Who you are 2. Speaking techniques 3. Personality profile
persona.assistantPlaceholder: Recommended structure: 1. Who you are 2. Speaking techniques 3. Personality profile
persona.pasteImageHint: Supports Ctrl+V to paste image directly
persona.pasteNoImage: No image found in clipboard. Copy an image and try again.
persona.pasteReadFailed: Failed to read clipboard image. Please try again.
persona.privateWorkspaceAvatarReadonly: Private-workspace persona avatars are managed by the private workspace files and cannot be edited here.
persona.avatarTargetMissing: This persona is not stored in the main config data yet, so its avatar cannot be saved here right now.
persona.cropInitFailed: Cropper init failed: preview node not found.
persona.avatarSaveEncodeFailed: Failed to encode avatar image. Please try again.
persona.cropMissingTarget: Avatar target not found, please reselect.
persona.cropperNotReady: Cropper not ready, please reselect image.
persona.privateMemoryHint: When enabled, this persona can use private memory (and always has access to global memory)
persona.mustExportFirst: You must export first before confirming disable.
persona.exportedConfirmUnlock: After successful export, the "Confirm" button will be automatically unlocked.
persona.noPrivateMemorySafe: This persona has no private memory, it is safe to disable private memory. Confirm to disable?
persona.countFailedButCanClose: Failed to count memories, but private memory can still be disabled.

demo.nativeNotificationSummary: Click the button below to trigger a system-native notification via the Tauri backend.
demo.nativeNotificationDevHint: Note: in dev mode, Windows may show a PowerShell name or default icon. That does not represent the final installed app.
demo.backgroundHint: Minimize the app or move it to the background before testing.
demo.nativeNotificationSent: Attempted to send a native notification.
demo.restartSummary: Trigger the normal app restart flow to test background-service shutdown and relaunch.

department.title: Department
department.hint: Define how PAI should get things done here.
department.name: Department Name
department.modelFailureFallback: When a request fails, switch to the next model in the queue
department.modelFallbackHint: Tried from top to bottom. If the upper model fails, the next one is used automatically.
department.modelSwitchCostWarning: Switching models breaks context caching and may incur high costs.
department.singleModelHint: By default, failed requests do not switch models. Do not turn this on if you do not understand it.
department.allowedModelsNote: Only models that support text conversations can be selected.

validation.emptyName: Department name cannot be empty. Auto-save is paused.
validation.duplicateName: Department names must be unique. Auto-save is paused.
validation.invalidModel: Department "{name}" contains an invalid driver model. Please reselect it before auto-save resumes.
validation.missingAssistant: The primary department is missing. Restore it first.
validation.invalidChildDepartment: Department "{name}" contains a direct child that no longer exists.
validation.departmentRelationCycle: The department hierarchy contains a cycle: {path}

department.summaryPlaceholder: Describe when others should immediately use the delegate tool to call this department.
department.guidePlaceholder: Visible to the department lead / workers: how this department should execute, report, and deliver.
department.guideHint: Tell this department's AI what it should pay attention to while working.
department.permissionHint: When enabled, this department filters builtin tools, skills, and MCP tools using whitelist or blacklist mode.
department.permissionModeBlacklistHint: Selected tools will be disabled for this department.
department.permissionModeWhitelistHint: Only selected tools will be available to this department.
department.permissionSkillsRequireExec: Skills require the terminal tool (exec) to be allowed first.
department.assigneePrimaryHint: The selected persona is the primary executor for this department.
department.selectHint: Please select a department from the left

departmentTree.title: Department Tree
departmentTree.hint: Manage direct child relationships here. A department can delegate work only to its direct children.
departmentTree.directChildrenHint: A child department can be shared by multiple parent departments. This page only edits the current department's direct children.
departmentTree.noCandidateChildren: There are no other departments available to attach.
departmentTree.connectSelfForbidden: A department cannot connect to itself.
departmentTree.connectCycleForbidden: This edge would create a cycle. A parent cannot connect to its own ancestor.

chatSettings.defaultModelsHint: Set the default model for each role here when nothing more specific is configured.
chatSettings.visionApiHint: Preferred when the main model lacks image support and no specific image model is set.
chatSettings.toolReviewApiHint: Preferred for lightweight tasks when no specific fast model is set.
chatSettings.expertChatModelHint: This is the default main chat model and is also preferred for expert tasks.
chatSettings.sttHint: Used first when no STT model is set elsewhere.
chatSettings.pdfReadModeHint: When set to Image, page images are only extracted if the selected model supports image input; otherwise it automatically falls back to text mode.
chatSettings.backgroundVoiceScreenshotKeywordsHint: Only applies to background voice activation. Matching any keyword triggers auto screenshot.
chatSettings.backgroundVoiceScreenshotModeHint: When a keyword matches, capture with this scope and attach to the current message.
chatSettings.instructionPresetsHint: Maintain short reusable instructions for the composer. They are attached to the current message as text blocks when sending.
chatSettings.instructionPresetPlaceholder: Enter a short instruction, e.g. Format the result as a table
chatSettings.cacheHint: Cache is namespaced by vision API config. Switching vision API uses its own cache namespace.

remoteIm.title: Contact Channels
remoteIm.choosePlatform: Choose a platform for the new channel
remoteIm.empty: No channel yet. Add one first.
remoteIm.enableNeedDingtalkCredentials: Please fill DingTalk Client ID and Client Secret before enabling the channel.
remoteIm.enableNeedFeishuCredentials: Please fill appId and appSecret in Credentials (JSON) before enabling the channel.
remoteIm.routingHint: The department handles messages inside this contact's independent conversation.
remoteIm.activateModeAlwaysHint: Always enter: when reception conditions are met, activation is always allowed.
remoteIm.activateModeKeywordHint: Keyword entry: activation is allowed only when a message hits a keyword.
remoteIm.activateModeNeverHint: Never enter: only record messages without entering activation.
remoteIm.muteKeywordsHint: When matched, immediately enter muted state and block later presence, reply, and sending checks.
remoteIm.unmuteKeywordsHint: Only works while muted. When matched, mute is lifted and this message continues normal checks.
remoteIm.responseStrategyAlwaysHint: Always reply: once entry is allowed, hand off directly to the processing department.
remoteIm.responseStrategySmartHint: Smart judge: first use a fast model to check whether this batch really needs a reply.
remoteIm.quickModelMissingHint: Smart judge requires a quick model first.
remoteIm.responseGuidancePlaceholder: Example: reply when the other person asks directly, requests help, needs confirmation, or clearly expects interaction.
remoteIm.responseGuidanceHint: Only applies to Smart Judge. The secretary sends the latest 7 messages and this batch to the fast model, then uses these rules to decide whether to reply.
remoteIm.systemWorkspaceReadonly: The system workspace always exists and is read-only
remoteIm.noCustomWorkspace: No custom workspace configured. Contact conversations only have the system workspace (read-only).
remoteIm.contactConversationHint: Contact messages always enter that contact's independent conversation. The processing department only decides which department and model handle background processing.
remoteIm.keywordMissingHint: Keyword entry is enabled, but keywords are empty. Please add keywords, otherwise entry will not be triggered.
remoteIm.channelDisabledHint: Channel is disabled, contact list is not operable.
remoteIm.onebotPortOccupied: OneBot fixed port is occupied, retrying with original port.
remoteIm.onebotBindFailed: OneBot port binding failed, please use a different port and restart the channel.
remoteIm.onebotBinding: OneBot is binding fixed port, contact list is not operable until connected.
remoteIm.onebotListening: OneBot server is listening on {addr}, waiting for NapCat/protocol client to connect.
remoteIm.channelNotConnected: Channel is not truly connected, contact list is not operable until connected.
remoteIm.channelToggleFailed: Channel restart failed, toggle not fully applied: {error}
remoteIm.channelSaveFailed: Save failed, channel status not applied.
remoteIm.contactContinueSession: Contact messages will continue to use this contact's independent session.
remoteIm.saveWeixinFirst: Please save the current WeChat channel config first, then scan to login.
remoteIm.logDedupSummary: This message was already processed before
remoteIm.logEnqueueFailedSummary: Message failed to enter processing pipeline
remoteIm.logAbnormalSummary: This log has not been formatted yet, but it is preserved because it is an error.
remoteIm.deleteContactConfirm:
Delete contact "{name}"?
Only the contact record will be removed; existing conversation history will be kept.
remoteIm.deleteContactSuccess: Contact deleted: {name}. Existing conversation history has been kept.

task.title: Task Board
task.discardConfirm: This task has unsaved changes. Close and discard them?
task.completedReadonlyHint: Completed tasks are currently view-only and cannot be edited again.
task.deleteConfirm: Delete this task? This action cannot be undone.

validation.repeatIntervalRequired: Recurring tasks need at least one value greater than 0 for weeks, days, or hours.
validation.repeatIntervalInvalid: Weeks, days, and hours must be integers greater than or equal to 0.

task.scheduleIntervalHint: Starting from the first run time, this task repeats by the combined interval of weeks, days, and hours.
task.scheduleUnsupportedHint: This task uses an older schedule that the simplified editor cannot fully map. If you leave weeks/days/hours unchanged, the original schedule will be preserved.

memory.vectorizationHint: Even without vectorization, you can still have a great recall experience
memory.importDone: Memory import completed: created {created}, merged {merged}, processed {total}
memory.importDialogHint: Choose a backup JSON first, verify the parsed result, then assign a target persona for each scope.
memory.importScopeMappingsHint: Each scope must be assigned to a target persona. Imported memories will be written as private memories of that persona.
memory.importNoSamples: No previewable memory samples were found in this file
memory.exportDialogHint: Choose which internal memory scopes to export before picking the save location.
memory.exportScopeHint: Only the checked memory scopes will be exported.
memory.exportNoScopes: No exportable memory scopes were found
memory.embeddingSyncSuccess: Embedding sync completed: added {added}, deleted {deleted}, total {batchCount} batches
memory.chatHistoryHint: Search compressed/archived conversation slices by persona

mcpServerCard.configPlaceholder: Enter MCP JSON, for example with transport, command, and args fields

logs.title: Call Logs (Memory)
logs.capacityHint: Keep only the latest {count} pipeline logs. Multiple chat rounds in one dispatch are grouped into their pipeline, and logs are cleared when the process exits.
logs.roundsHint: Click a round to inspect Response / Tools / Headers / Error
logs.noRoundDetails: This dispatch has no expandable round details.

chat.mentionUnavailableSelf: The current foreground identity cannot summon itself

chat.mentionUnavailableNoModel: The target department has no available text model

chat.workspacePickerEmpty: No conversation workspace has been added yet. Add one to continue.
chat.newConversationTopicPlaceholder: Enter a topic for this conversation, or leave blank
chat.organizingContextDisabled: This conversation is organizing context in the background and cannot be switched right now.

localTools.modelNotAvailable: Current session preferred model is not available, please select again.

localTools.modelSwitched: Session preferred model switched, will take effect at next dispatch.

chat.trimTip: Choose compact or archive for the current chat
chat.branchingConversationDetail: Please wait while the new conversation branch is prepared.
chat.forwardingConversationSelectionDetail: Please wait while the selected messages are inserted into the target conversation.

shareExport.canvasFailed: Failed to create share canvas: cannot get 2D drawing context

chat.shareDialogMessage: {count} messages selected. Choose an export format.
chat.shareDialogHint: HTML exports a standalone static history page, while image exports a long screenshot of the selected messages.
chat.copyFailed: Copy failed. Please check clipboard permissions and try again.

plan.confirmHint: If you disagree, just tell me your thoughts.
plan.sidebarHint: Click the link below to read the plan in the sidebar

supervision.activeButtonTitle: This conversation already has an active Goal Task. Click to overwrite it.
supervision.buttonHint: Create a goal delegation bound to this conversation
supervision.activeHint: This conversation already has an active Goal Task ending at {endAt}. You can overwrite it directly.
supervision.goalPlaceholder: Enter the goal you want to keep moving forward
supervision.noConversation: No conversation is available for a Goal Task.

toolReview.title: Tool Assessment
toolReview.empty: No terminal or patch changes are available for assessment yet.
toolReview.customDialogPlaceholder: e.g. Review only the recent window switching refactor
toolReview.reportUnavailable: No code review reports are available yet.
toolReview.reviewUnavailable: No assessment opinion has been generated yet.
toolReview.severityP0: P0: Critical damage, data corruption, major security issue, core functionality unavailable
toolReview.severityP1: P1: High probability functional error or obvious incorrect behavior
toolReview.severityP2: P2: Local defect, boundary error, reproducible but minor impact
toolReview.severityP3: P3: Low risk but still a real issue

selection.forwardHint: Selected source messages will be appended to the target conversation. If the target conversation is streaming, this will fail.
selection.delegateHint: Selected messages are sent to the sub-agent as plain-text background. You can also delegate without selecting messages.
selection.shareHint: Export the selected messages as a shareable file.
selection.codeReviewPrompt: Please review the current workspace code changes according to the built-in code-review skill rules, using the selected messages as context.
selection.codeReviewFocus: First confirm clear diff, then only report real, reproducible defects that affect correctness/stability/security; if no defects are confirmed, state that directly.
selection.codeReviewSkillPrefix: Please strictly follow the following code-review skill content:
selection.codeReviewOutputConstraint: Additional output constraint: This task is a user-initiated async delegate, and results will be written back directly to the original conversation; please report review conclusions in natural language, do not output tool evaluation JSON unless the user explicitly requests JSON.
selection.codeReviewRequirement1: - Review current workspace code changes, not individual tool calls.
selection.codeReviewRequirement2: - First confirm clear diff, then make defect judgments.
selection.codeReviewRequirement3: - Only report real, reproducible defects that affect correctness/stability/security.
selection.codeReviewRequirement4: - Do not treat style suggestions, naming preferences, or speculation that cannot be proven from diff as defects.

chat.codeReviewNoConversation: No active conversation to start a code review.
chat.codeReviewNoDepartment: No available department to start a code review.
chat.codeReviewRetryNoConversation: No active conversation to regenerate the code review report.
chat.codeReviewRetryNoDepartment: No subordinate department available to retry the code review.
chat.codeReviewRetryUnsupportedScope: Unsupported code review scope for retry: {scope}
chat.codeReviewDeleteFailed: Failed to delete code review report

prompt.emptyHint:
Choose a preview mode
Chat: normal chat request body

hints.backgroundWake: When enabled, the recording key can trigger voice input.
hints.avatar: Avatars are saved into the existing persona avatar storage.
hints.privateDirectory: This is the AI private directory for files used by tool runs.
hints.readyToOpenChat: Basic setup is ready to open the chat window.

hotkeyHints.idle: Click Record, then press a hotkey. Esc cancels.

runtimeLogs.title: Runtime Logs (Memory)
runtimeLogs.hint: Only in-memory logs are kept, capped at 10 MB and cleared when the process exits.
runtimeLogs.noCopyableLogs: There are no logs to copy
runtimeLogs.copyFailed: Copy failed. Please check clipboard permissions.

terminalApprovalImpact.workspaceWriteReason: This will directly modify workspace files.
terminalApprovalImpact.readOnlyReason: This request mainly reads content and does not write directly.
terminalApprovalImpact.noCommandReason: This approval did not include command text that can be analyzed.
terminalApprovalImpact.destructiveReason: Includes deletion, formatting, or system-level destructive commands.
terminalApprovalImpact.writeIntentReason: Includes file writes, overwrites, output redirection, moves, or bulk changes.
terminalApprovalImpact.queryReason: Looks like a query, read, or inspection command.
terminalApprovalImpact.unknownReason: The command is outside common rules. Confirm against the impact scope.

rewind.title: Rewind Options
rewind.hint: Choose what this rewind should affect:
rewind.failedNoTarget: Rewind failed: No rewoundable user message found
rewind.failedBusy: Current session is running or compacting context, please wait.
rewind.failedFileChanged: Rewind failed: File status changed, patch tool is irreversible, please select message-only rewind
rewind.failedNoMessage: Rewind failed: No user message to fill back
rewind.regenerateBusy: Current session is running or compacting context, please wait.

trim.title: Process Current Conversation
trim.loading: Checking whether the current conversation should be compacted, archived, or dropped...
trim.compactSummary: Organize older history while keeping the current conversation active.
trim.compactHint: Best when context usage is high but you still want to continue the topic.
trim.dropSummary: Delete the current conversation without summary or archive.
trim.dropHint: Best for tests, accidental triggers, or content you do not need to keep.
trim.archiveSummary: Run memory reflection and keep the full conversation body without summary.
trim.archiveHint: Best when this conversation is finished and should become history.

about.updateReadyAction: Update {version} has finished downloading. Click to update and restart
